sourceSummary.oneLine: Reliability test result report for A1717MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector showing PASS results across environmental, operational, power cycle, and aging tests.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Design and development verification/validation reliability evidence for the A1717MCW detector.
keyPoints: Final result is PASS for the A1717MCW reliability test sequence.
Test model is A1717MCW, model name Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, with 1 ea test unit.
Tests include heat resistance, high temperature/humidity durability, repetitive bright image capture, power on/off, and aging.
Heat Resistance Test references Applied Standard: IEC60068-2-78.
No failure or no sign of failure was reported for appearance, operation, and images after testing.

evidence.claim: The document reports reliability test results for model A1717MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Reliability Test Result Report MODEL NAME Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector TEST TIME 10/11 ~ 10/31 1ea UNIT ... MODEL A1717MCW

evidence.claim: The final reliability test result is PASS.
The tested product is identified as a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: MODEL NAME Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The test unit quantity was 1 ea.
Heat Resistance Test passed under rapid repetitive temperature change conditions.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Category Heat Resistance Test Cycle(30cycle) Result Pass

evidence.claim: Heat Resistance Test condition was reported as -20℃ to 60℃ in 30 cycles.
evidence.evidenceText: No Failure on appearance and images under -20℃ ⇔ 60℃ in 30Cycle

evidence.claim: The summary table lists Heat Resistance Test condition as -20℃ to 70℃ in 30 cycles.
Heat Resistance Test references IEC60068-2-78 as an applied standard.
evidence.evidenceText: 2. Test Condition and Standard [Applied Standard: IEC60068-2-78]

evidence.claim: High Temperature, Humidity Durability Test passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Category High Temperature, Humidity Durability Test Result Pass

evidence.claim: High Temperature, Humidity Durability condition was 55℃, 95% humidity for 240 hours.
evidence.evidenceText: No failure on appearance and images under 55℃ / 95% 240hr

evidence.claim: Repetitive Bright Image Capture Test passed at 500 cycles.
evidence.evidenceText: No failure in Repetitive Bright Capture 500 Cycle Pass

evidence.claim: Power On/Off Test passed at 500 cycles using power on, dark image capture, and power off sequence.
evidence.evidenceText: Power on -> Dark image capture -> Power off (500 Cycle) Pass

evidence.claim: Aging Test passed for 24 hours with more than 1000 image acquisitions.
evidence.evidenceText: Aging시(24HR) : More than 1000 image acquisition) Pass

evidence.claim: No failures were recorded in the failure occurrence report.
evidence.evidenceText: 4. Failure Occurence Report ... No failure on Aging Test for 24 hrs Aging Test

evidence.claim: The test step is described as Developmental Evaluation in detailed test sheets.
evidence.evidenceText: MODEL A1717MCW Test Step Developmental Evaluation

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
Dates are provided only as month/day ranges such as 10/11 ~ 10/31 and no year is present.
Heat Resistance Test temperature condition is inconsistent: summary lists -20℃ ⇔ 70℃ 30Cycle, while detailed result states -20℃ ⇔ 60℃ in 30Cycle.
Revision/version appears to be the form identifier AIF 801-10-4 (REV.00), not necessarily the report revision.
OCR/text quality issues are present, including misspellings and truncations such as '3nd', 'Occurence', 'Befere', and 'Test Metho'.
